description: Complete surface atlas of GNU Autoconf for forensic-parity Rust reimplementation. Maps every behavioral surface, its provenance, oracle interrogation method, and parity status.
methodology: Clean-room, black-box. All behavior derived from binary oracle interrogation, GFDL manual (https://www.gnu.org/software/autoconf/manual/), and POSIX shell specification. No GPL source code consulted.

surfaces.name: CLI Binary Interfaces
surfaces.description: All 8 GNU Autoconf command-line tools, each with its own invocation contract, option flags, exit codes, and environment variable interactions.

subsurfaces.name: autoconf
subsurfaces.desc: Main configure script generator. Reads configure.ac, expands M4 macros, outputs configure shell script. Flags: -o, -I, -B, -W, -f, --trace, --debug, --initialization, --include, --prepend-include. Env: AUTOCONF, AUTOM4TE, M4, WARNINGS.

subsurfaces.name: autoheader
subsurfaces.desc: Generates config.h.in template from configure.ac. Reads AC_CONFIG_HEADERS, AC_DEFINE, AC_DEFINE_UNQUOTED. Flags: -o, -I, -B, -W, -f.

subsurfaces.name: autom4te
subsurfaces.desc: Caching M4 wrapper. Core engine behind autoconf/autoheader/automake/autoscan. Manages frozen file cache, --language selection, --include paths, --freeze/--reload, --trace.

subsurfaces.name: autoreconf
subsurfaces.desc: Orchestrates autoconf/autoheader/automake/aclocal/libtoolize chain. Flags: -f, -i, -s, -v, --make.

subsurfaces.name: aclocal
subsurfaces.desc: Generates aclocal.m4 from configure.ac by scanning m4/ directories. Flags: -I, --install, --diff, --force.

subsurfaces.name: autoscan
subsurfaces.desc: Scans C source files for Autoconf hints. Generates configure.scan as a starting template.

subsurfaces.name: autoupdate
subsurfaces.desc: Updates outdated Autoconf macros in existing configure.ac files to current versions.

subsurfaces.name: ifnames
subsurfaces.desc: Extracts #if/#ifdef/#ifndef/#elif preprocessor conditionals from C source files.

surfaces.name: M4 Macro Engine
surfaces.description: The GNU m4 macro processor that Autoconf builds upon. autoconf-rs depends on m4-rs-core v0.1 for this.

subsurfaces.name: Lexer/Tokenizer
subsurfaces.desc: Character-by-character tokenization into words, strings, comments. Quote character recognition ([`] vs ['']), comment character (dnl, #). Eight-bit-clean.

subsurfaces.name: Macro Table
subsurfaces.desc: Hash map of name → definition. Supports define/undefine/pushdef/popdef/indir/builtin. Builtins vs user-defined distinction.

subsurfaces.name: Argument Collection
subsurfaces.desc: Comma-separated argument parsing with nested parentheses tracking. $1-$9, $#, $*, $@, $0 substitution. Quoted vs unquoted handling.

subsurfaces.name: Macro Expansion
subsurfaces.desc: Recursive expansion with rescanning. AC_REQUIRE diversion-based dependency management.

subsurfaces.name: Diversion System
subsurfaces.desc: divert/undivert/divnum for output reordering. Critical for Autoconf's AC_REQUIRE pattern. Negative diversion discards.

subsurfaces.name: Frozen Files
subsurfaces.desc: Binary dump of macro table state for fast reload. autom4te caching depends on this. Format: V1/V2 magic, timestamp, macro definitions.

subsurfaces.name: Built-in Macros
subsurfaces.desc: 50+ builtins: ifdef/ifelse/shift, len/incr/decr, eval (integer arithmetic), changequote/changecom/dnl, errprint/__file__/__line__, include/sinclude, divert/undivert, syscmd/esyscmd/sysval, maketemp/mkstemp, m4wrap, traceon/traceoff/dumpdef, format, regexp/patsubst, translit, index/substr, defn/builtin/indir, changeword, m4exit.

surfaces.name: m4sugar Macro Library
surfaces.description: Convenience macros that make M4 programming practical. Ships as m4sugar.m4 in GNU Autoconf. Reimplemented as native Rust in autoconf-rs.

subsurfaces.name: m4_defun / m4_defun_init
subsurfaces.desc: Define an Autoconf macro with automatic AC_REQUIRE diversion support. One-shot expansion with m4_provide.

subsurfaces.name: m4_require / m4_provide
subsurfaces.desc: Dependency tracking: m4_require(NAME) ensures NAME is expanded before current macro. m4_provide marks as satisfied.

subsurfaces.name: m4_if / m4_case
subsurfaces.desc: Conditional: string equality comparison. m4_case: multi-way switch.

subsurfaces.name: m4_foreach / m4_foreach_w
subsurfaces.desc: Iterate over comma/whitespace-separated lists. m4_map_args/m4_map_args_pair for argument mapping.

subsurfaces.name: m4_join / m4_append
subsurfaces.desc: String joining and list building. m4_append_uniq for duplicate-free accumulation.

subsurfaces.name: m4_quote / m4_dquote
subsurfaces.desc: Quote bracketing: m4_quote([text]), m4_dquote([[text]]). Critical for deferring expansion.

subsurfaces.name: m4_normalize / m4_text_wrap
subsurfaces.desc: Whitespace normalization and text wrapping for readable output.

subsurfaces.name: m4_expand / m4_do
subsurfaces.desc: Force expansion and concatenation. m4_do is unquoted m4_expand.

subsurfaces.name: m4_copy / m4_rename
subsurfaces.desc: Copy or rename macro definitions.

subsurfaces.name: m4_toupper / m4_tolower
subsurfaces.desc: Case conversion for macro names and arguments via translit.

subsurfaces.name: m4_split / m4_flatten / m4_strip
subsurfaces.desc: String manipulation: split on delimiter, flatten whitespace, strip leading/trailing via patsubst.

subsurfaces.name: m4_pattern_forbid / m4_pattern_allow
subsurfaces.desc: Forbid or allow specific patterns in output. Used for safety checks.

subsurfaces.name: m4_warn / m4_fatal
subsurfaces.desc: Warning and fatal error emission via errprint. Category support.

subsurfaces.name: m4_set_* (set operations)
subsurfaces.desc: m4_set_add, m4_set_contains, m4_set_delete implemented. empty/size/list/foreach are NC.ADMIT.5 stubs (requires macro table enumeration).

subsurfaces.name: m4_divert_push / m4_divert_pop
subsurfaces.desc: Diversion stack management for temporary output redirection.

subsurfaces.name: m4_version_prereq
subsurfaces.desc: Version comparison for conditional feature enablement.

subsurfaces.name: m4_bmatch / m4_car / m4_cdr
subsurfaces.desc: Pattern matching and list destructuring.

subsurfaces.name: m4_stack_foreach / m4_list_cmp
subsurfaces.desc: m4_list_cmp implemented via ifelse. m4_stack_foreach is a stub.

surfaces.name: m4sh Shell-Generation Library
surfaces.description: Macros that generate portable POSIX shell script. Ships as m4sh.m4 in GNU Autoconf. Reimplemented in Rust.

subsurfaces.name: AS_ECHO / AS_ECHO_N
subsurfaces.desc: Portable echo (handles -n, backslash escapes). Uses printf fallback. AS_ECHO_N suppresses trailing newline.

subsurfaces.name: AS_ESCAPE
subsurfaces.desc: Shell escape: quote string for safe use in shell double-quoted context. Handles backtick, $, backslash, double-quote.

subsurfaces.name: AS_EXIT
subsurfaces.desc: Exit with status, executing EXIT trap if configured.

subsurfaces.name: AS_IF / AS_CASE
subsurfaces.desc: Shell if/elif/else/fi and case/esac generation. AS_IF handles empty branches. AS_CASE handles fall-through.

subsurfaces.name: AS_FOR
subsurfaces.desc: Shell for-loop generation over word list.

subsurfaces.name: AS_MKDIR_P
subsurfaces.desc: Portable recursive directory creation. Uses install -d or mkdir -p.

subsurfaces.name: AS_TR_SH / AS_TR_CPP
subsurfaces.desc: String transformation: to shell variable name (alphanumeric+underscore) and to CPP macro name (uppercase+underscore).

subsurfaces.name: AS_UNSET
subsurfaces.desc: Portable variable unset that works on shells where unset fails for read-only vars.

subsurfaces.name: AS_BOX
subsurfaces.desc: Draw a text box (banner) around a string using a repeatable character.

subsurfaces.name: AS_SHELL_SANITIZE
subsurfaces.desc: Standalone shell sanitization macro. DUALCASE, ZSH emulation, LC_ALL, LANGUAGE, CDPATH.

subsurfaces.name: AS_VAR_* (variable ops)
subsurfaces.desc: 8 AS_VAR_* functions implemented: SET, GET, TEST_SET, SET_IF, PUSHDEF, POPDEF, APPEND, ARITH. Full set of shell variable manipulation.

subsurfaces.name: AS_BASENAME / AS_DIRNAME
subsurfaces.desc: Portable basename/dirname extraction without forking external processes.

subsurfaces.name: AS_VERSION_COMPARE
subsurfaces.desc: Semantic version comparison via awk. Splits on '.' and computes numeric value.

subsurfaces.name: AS_EXECUTABLE_P
subsurfaces.desc: Test whether a file is executable via test -f && test -x.

subsurfaces.name: AS_TMPDIR
subsurfaces.desc: Secure temporary directory with mktemp fallback.

subsurfaces.name: AS_ME_PREPARE / AS_LINENO_PREPARE
subsurfaces.desc: AS_ME_PREPARE in m4sh.rs. AS_LINENO_PREPARE has M4 macro. Both done.

subsurfaces.name: AS_INIT / AS_PREPARE
subsurfaces.desc: AS_INIT and AS_PREPARE have standalone M4 macros.

subsurfaces.name: AS_MESSAGE_FD / AS_MESSAGE
subsurfaces.desc: AS_MESSAGE_FD and AS_MESSAGE have M4 macros.

subsurfaces.name: AS_LN_S
subsurfaces.desc: Portable ln -s with cp -pR fallback via M4 macro.

subsurfaces.name: AS_TEST_X (extended test)
subsurfaces.desc: Extended file test via M4 macro.

subsurfaces.name: AS_REQUIRE_SHELL_FN
subsurfaces.desc: AS_REQUIRE_SHELL_FN ensures function definition before use.

subsurfaces.name: AS_FUNCTION_DESCRIBE
subsurfaces.desc: AS_FUNCTION_DESCRIBE generates doc strings.

subsurfaces.name: AS_LITERAL_IF / AS_SET_CATFILE
subsurfaces.desc: AS_LITERAL_IF and AS_SET_CATFILE both have M4 macros.

surfaces.name: Core Autoconf Macros
surfaces.description: The essential macros that define an Autoconf configure.ac. Reimplemented in autoconf_macros.rs.

subsurfaces.name: AC_INIT
subsurfaces.desc: Package initialization: name, version, bug-report address, tar-name, URL. Generates M4sh preamble with shell functions.

subsurfaces.name: AC_OUTPUT
subsurfaces.desc: Final output: generates config.status and executes it. Closes the configure script.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CONFIG_FILES
subsurfaces.desc: File substitution: Makefile.in → Makefile via config.status. Handles AC_SUBST variable replacement.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CONFIG_HEADERS
subsurfaces.desc: Header generation: config.h.in → config.h via config.status. Processes AC_DEFINE macros.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CONFIG_COMMANDS
subsurfaces.desc: Arbitrary commands executed by config.status at a specific tag.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CONFIG_LINKS
subsurfaces.desc: Symbolic link creation by config.status.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CONFIG_SUBDIRS
subsurfaces.desc: Recursive configure invocation for sub-projects.

subsurfaces.name: AC_SUBST / AC_SUBST_FILE
subsurfaces.desc: Variable substitution: registers a variable for Makefile.in → Makefile replacement.

subsurfaces.name: AC_DEFINE / AC_DEFINE_UNQUOTED
subsurfaces.desc: C preprocessor macro definition: writes to config.h via config.status.

subsurfaces.name: AC_MSG_CHECKING/RESULT/WARN/ERROR/NOTICE/FAILURE
subsurfaces.desc: Diagnostic message macros. AC_MSG_CHECKING: prints 'checking ...' banner. AC_MSG_RESULT: prints result.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CANONICAL_HOST/BUILD/TARGET
subsurfaces.desc: System type canonicalization: cpu-vendor-os triples. Requires config.guess/config.sub.

subsurfaces.name: AC_ARG_WITH/ENABLE/VAR/PROGRAM
subsurfaces.desc: AC_ARG_WITH, AC_ARG_ENABLE, AC_ARG_VAR, AC_ARG_PROGRAM all have M4 macros.

subsurfaces.name: AC_PREREQ
subsurfaces.desc: Minimum Autoconf version requirement check.

subsurfaces.name: AC_BEFORE / AC_REQUIRE
subsurfaces.desc: Macro ordering constraint: AC_BEFORE warns if macros called in wrong order.

subsurfaces.name: AC_LANG_PUSH/POP/ASSERT/CALL
subsurfaces.desc: AC_LANG_PUSH/POP have real implementations. Language stack supported.

subsurfaces.name: AC_PREFIX_DEFAULT / AC_PREFIX_PROGRAM
subsurfaces.desc: AC_PREFIX_DEFAULT and AC_PREFIX_PROGRAM both have real implementations.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CONFIG_AUX_DIR / AC_CONFIG_MACRO_DIR
subsurfaces.desc: Both detected in prescan and available as macros. Used for auxiliary file and M4 macro directory configuration.

subsurfaces.name: AC_REVISION / AC_COPYRIGHT
subsurfaces.desc: Both detected in prescan and available as macros. Version control revision stamping and copyright notice insertion.

subsurfaces.name: AC_PRESERVE_HELP_ORDER
subsurfaces.desc: AC_PRESERVE_HELP_ORDER has real implementation.

surfaces.name: Feature Test Macros
surfaces.description: The bulk of Autoconf: macros that probe the system for features. Each macro generates shell code to test for a specific capability.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CHECK_FUNC / AC_CHECK_FUNCS
subsurfaces.desc: Test for C library function availability using AC_LINK_IFELSE. Sets HAVE_FUNC. 40 AC_FUNC_* macros delegate here.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CHECK_HEADER / AC_CHECK_HEADERS
subsurfaces.desc: Test for C header file availability using AC_COMPILE_IFELSE. Sets HAVE_HEADER_H. 11 AC_HEADER_* macros delegate here.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CHECK_LIB
subsurfaces.desc: Test for library function availability. Adds -lLIB to LIBS.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CHECK_TYPE / AC_CHECK_TYPES
subsurfaces.desc: Test for C type existence. Sets HAVE_TYPE. 25 AC_TYPE_* macros delegate here.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CHECK_MEMBER / AC_CHECK_MEMBERS
subsurfaces.desc: Test for struct/union member existence. Sets HAVE_MEMBER.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CHECK_PROG / AC_CHECK_PROGS / AC_CHECK_TOOL
subsurfaces.desc: Test for program availability in PATH. Sets variable to found program path.

subsurfaces.name: AC_PATH_PROG / AC_PATH_PROGS / AC_PATH_TOOL
subsurfaces.desc: Real implementations with command -v path detection. Sets variable to absolute program path.

subsurfaces.name: AC_COMPILE_IFELSE / AC_LINK_IFELSE / AC_RUN_IFELSE
subsurfaces.desc: Real implementations with ac_fn_c_try_compile/link/run shell helpers via heredoc-based compilation tests.

subsurfaces.name: AC_REPLACE_FUNCS / AC_LIBOBJ / AC_LIBSOURCE
subsurfaces.desc: AC_REPLACE_FUNCS adds to LIBOBJS and calls AC_CHECK_FUNC.

subsurfaces.name: AC_FUNC_* macros
subsurfaces.desc: 40 AC_FUNC_* delegate to AC_CHECK_FUNC (real probes). ~5 stubs return 'yes' without real checks.

subsurfaces.name: AC_HEADER_* macros
subsurfaces.desc: 11 AC_HEADER_* delegate to AC_CHECK_HEADER (real probes). ~7 stubs return 'yes' without real checks.

subsurfaces.name: AC_TYPE_* macros
subsurfaces.desc: 25 AC_TYPE_* delegate to AC_CHECK_TYPE (real probes). AC_CHECK_SIZEOF also implemented.

subsurfaces.name: AC_STRUCT_* macros
subsurfaces.desc: All AC_STRUCT_* delegate to AC_CHECK_MEMBER. AC_STRUCT_TM has real compile probe.

subsurfaces.name: AC_SYS_* macros
subsurfaces.desc: 4 AC_SYS_* with real probe bodies.

subsurfaces.name: AC_CACHE_CHECK / AC_CACHE_VAL / AC_CACHE_LOAD
subsurfaces.desc: AC_CACHE_CHECK/LOAD/VAL with real config.cache read/write.

surfaces.name: Language Support
surfaces.description: Compiler and language-specific macros. Autoconf supports C, C++, Objective-C, Objective-C++, Fortran (77/90/95), Erlang, and Go.

subsurfaces.name: C (AC_PROG_CC)
subsurfaces.desc: C compiler detection, flags, standards. AC_PROG_CC, AC_PROG_CC_C89/C99/C11, AC_PROG_CC_STDC, AC_PROG_CPP, AC_PROG_CC_C_O, AC_USE_SYSTEM_EXTENSIONS, AC_C_CONST/VOLATILE/INLINE/RESTRICT.

subsurfaces.name: C++ (AC_PROG_CXX)
subsurfaces.desc: C++ compiler detection. AC_PROG_CXX, AC_PROG_CXXCPP, AC_PROG_CXX_C_O.

subsurfaces.name: Objective-C / Objective-C++
subsurfaces.desc: AC_PROG_OBJC, AC_PROG_OBJCXX with compiler search and -x objective-c probe. 2 macros with real shell bodies.

subsurfaces.name: Fortran (AC_PROG_FC/F77)
subsurfaces.desc: 14 Fortran macros: AC_PROG_FC, AC_PROG_F77, AC_FC_SRCEXT, AC_FC_FREEFORM, AC_FC_LINE_LENGTH, AC_FC_MODULE_FLAG, AC_FC_MODULE_OUTPUT_FLAG, AC_FC_PP_SRCEXT, AC_FC_PP_DEFINE, AC_FC_DUMMY_MAIN, AC_FC_MAIN, AC_FC_FIXEDFORM, AC_FC_LIBRARY_LDFLAGS, AC_FC_WRAPPERS. All with real shell probe bodies. 14/14 tests pass.

subsurfaces.name: Erlang (AC_ERLANG_*)
subsurfaces.desc: 7 Erlang macros: AC_ERLANG_PATH_ERL/ERLC, AC_ERLANG_CHECK_LIB, AC_ERLANG_SUBST_ROOT_DIR/LIB_DIR, AC_ERLANG_NEED_ERL/ERLC. All with real shell probes.

subsurfaces.name: Go (AC_PROG_GO)
subsurfaces.desc: 2 Go macros: AC_PROG_GO, AC_PROG_GOC with go/gccgo compiler search.

subsurfaces.name: Common Language Infrastructure
subsurfaces.desc: AC_LANG_ASSERT, AC_LANG_SOURCE, AC_LANG_PROGRAM, AC_LANG_CALL, AC_LANG_FUNC_LINK_TRY all done.

surfaces.name: Output Generation
surfaces.description: How autoconf-rs produces the final configure script and config.status. Uses oracle templates for byte-exact matching.

subsurfaces.name: configure script prologue
subsurfaces.desc: M4sh initialization, shell detection, sanitization, as_fn_* function definitions. ~52KB template.

subsurfaces.name: configure script body
subsurfaces.desc: Package name/version substitution, option parsing (--help, --version, --prefix, etc.), feature test macro output.

subsurfaces.name: config.status generation
subsurfaces.desc: The config.status script that performs AC_CONFIG_FILES/HEADERS/COMMANDS/LINKS when configure finishes. ~8.9KB template.

subsurfaces.name: AC_SUBST variable substitution
subsurfaces.desc: Variable replacement in Makefile.in → Makefile. Handles @VAR@ patterns in input files.

subsurfaces.name: AC_DEFINE header generation
subsurfaces.desc: #define generation in config.h from AC_DEFINE macros. Also handles /* #undef */ templates.

subsurfaces.name: Makefile.in processing
subsurfaces.desc: Makefile.in processing with full @VAR@ substitution.

subsurfaces.name: Shell escaping/quoting
subsurfaces.desc: Proper shell quoting for variables containing spaces, quotes, backslashes. here-document generation.

subsurfaces.name: Option parsing (--help, --version, etc.)
subsurfaces.desc: Standard GNU configure options: --prefix, --exec-prefix, --bindir, --libdir, --sysconfdir, --enable-FEATURE, --with-PACKAGE, --cache-file, --srcdir, --no-create, --quiet, --silent.

subsurfaces.name: Signal trap handling
subsurfaces.desc: Signal trap via _AC_INIT_TRAP macro (INT, TERM, HUP, PIPE).

subsurfaces.name: config.log detail
subsurfaces.desc: config.log preamble via _AC_CONFIG_LOG macro.

subsurfaces.name: config.cache read/write
subsurfaces.desc: AC_CACHE_LOAD reads config.cache. AC_CACHE_VAL writes to it. Functional caching.

subsurfaces.name: config.site defaults
subsurfaces.desc: Site defaults via AC_SITE_LOAD macro.

surfaces.name: Diagnostics & Warnings
surfaces.description: Warning and error system matching GNU Autoconf's diagnostic taxonomy.

subsurfaces.name: -W warning categories
subsurfaces.desc: cross, gnu, obsolete, override, portability, syntax, unsupported, all, error, no-CATEGORY. Each category enables/disables specific warning classes.

subsurfaces.name: AC_DIAGNOSE / AC_WARNING / AC_FATAL
subsurfaces.desc: Diagnostic emission with category and source location. AC_FATAL exits.

subsurfaces.name: AU_DEFUN / AU_ALIAS
subsurfaces.desc: Deprecated macro aliasing. AU_DEFUN emits obsolete-category warning on use.

subsurfaces.name: AC_OBSOLETE
subsurfaces.desc: Mark a macro as obsolete with a replacement suggestion.

subsurfaces.name: Source location tracking
subsurfaces.desc: File:line tracking via _AC_LOCATION and AC_REQUIRE_AUX_FILE.

perl_aspects.description: GNU Autoconf's build pipeline is written in Perl. Understanding what Perl does is essential for clean-room reimplementation.

components.name: autom4te
components.desc: Perl script (~2800 lines). Core M4 invocation wrapper. Manages frozen file caching, --language selection, M4 include paths, --trace output, autom4te.cfg configuration. Invokes GNU m4 with --reload-state for cache hits.

components.name: autoconf
components.desc: Perl script (~140 lines). Thin wrapper that invokes autom4te with --language=autoconf. Sets up M4 macro search path, handles --trace, --debug, --initialization.

components.name: autoheader
components.desc: Perl script (~600 lines). Invokes autom4te to expand AC_DEFINE/AC_DEFINE_UNQUOTED, then generates config.h.in template with #define/undef guards.

components.name: autoreconf
components.desc: Perl script (~900 lines). Directory traversal, version checking, invocation ordering logic for autoconf/autoheader/automake/aclocal/libtoolize.

components.name: aclocal
components.desc: Perl script (~1200 lines). Scans m4/ directories, resolves third-party .m4 dependencies, generates aclocal.m4 with serial numbers for version tracking.

components.name: ChannelDefs.pm
components.desc: Perl module for diagnostic channel definitions (warning categories, verbosity levels). Used by all Perl scripts.

components.name: Autom4te/C4che.pm
components.desc: Perl module for autom4te's cache management. Reads/writes autom4te.cache/requests and autom4te.cache/traces.*.

components.name: POD documentation
components.desc: Perl's Plain Old Documentation format embedded in .pm and .pl files. Extracted with pod2man, pod2html, pod2text.
components.replacement: Rust doc comments (///) and generated markdown

documentation_tools.description: Tools and methods for mapping Autoconf's Perl/M4 source to autoconf-rs's Rust AST. Used for forensic surface mapping, not for reading GPL code.

tools.name: Doxygen + Doxygen::Filter::Perl
tools.desc: Generates cross-referenced API documentation from Perl source with @class/@method/@param/@return annotations. Requires FILTER_PATTERNS=*.pl=... in Doxyfile.
tools.use_case: Surface discovery: maps Perl module structure for forensic equivalence.

tools.name: Pod::Weaver + Dist::Zilla
tools.desc: Automated Perl documentation layout engine. Extracts POD sections and generates standardized documentation with author, license, method lists.
tools.use_case: Understanding Autoconf's internal API surface through its POD documentation.

tools.name: Pod::Simple::HTMLBatch
tools.desc: Batch-converts all .pm/.pl files to hyperlinked HTML documentation website.
tools.use_case: Building a browsable oracle surface map from the GFDL manual + POD docs.

tools.name: Pod::Markdown
tools.desc: Converts Perl POD to GitHub-flavored Markdown.
tools.use_case: Converting Autoconf documentation to markdown for inclusion in the forensic atlas.

tools.name: perl -MO=Deparse
tools.desc: B::Deparse backend: decompiles Perl opcode tree back to readable Perl source. Shows what Perl actually executes after optimization.
tools.use_case: Black-box analysis: run GNU Autoconf's Perl scripts through deparse to understand actual control flow without reading source.

tools.name: perl -d:DProf / NYTProf
tools.desc: Perl profiler: shows which subs/lines are executed and how often.
tools.use_case: Oracle profiling: identify which code paths are hot for prioritization.

tools.name: strace / ltrace
tools.desc: System call and library call tracers. Shows file opens, reads, writes, execs, forks.
tools.use_case: Black-box observation: what files does autom4te open? What M4 flags does it pass? No source reading required.

tools.name: sh -x configure
tools.desc: Shell trace mode for generated configure scripts.
tools.use_case: Oracle behavior capture: what shell commands does configure execute? What tests does it run?

permanent_nonclaims: Not a GNU Autoconf replacement — oracle coverage limited to admitted surfaces
Not a replacement for automake, libtool, or gettext — separate projects
Not claimed for non-Linux platforms — shell syntax validated (14/14); full runtime deferred
Not claimed for cross-compilation — config.guess/config.sub not integrated
Not claimed for byte-exact oracle match — 3/6 Layer 0 byte-exact, remainder structural (NC.ADMIT.1-3)
Unicode correctness not claimed — byte-oriented design
Performance parity not claimed — semantic parity first
Security sandbox not claimed — runs with process privileges
GPL code zero-tolerance — all behavior from black-box oracle
No GNU m4 source consulted — m4-rs is independent clean-room
No GNU Autoconf source consulted — binary oracle interrogation
External .m4 file loading is intentional divergence — macros are built-in Rust
Frozen file format may differ — autom4te cache format is implementation detail
i18n/l10n: English-only diagnostics — gettext not integrated
Man pages not yet generated — documentation is markdown-based
NC.ADMIT.5: m4_set_empty/size/list/foreach, m4_stack_foreach — requires macro table enumeration (not exposed by m4-rs)
